name: Michael Lehrer
bio: Michael Lehrer was an American comedian and Second City veteran who became a frequent performer on the live comedy podcast Kill Tony. Diagnosed with ALS, he continued performing stand-up from a wheelchair, drawing material from life with the disease until his death in 2023.

timeline.ev: Named a Just For Laughs Montreal New Face of Comedy
Begins a frequent run on Kill Tony, performing 99 times through 2022
Dies at age 44 in Portland, Oregon

accolades: 2014 Just For Laughs New Face of Comedy
Second City sketch-revue performer and writer

machine.reason: zero clips on file — every comic needs at least 1 official clip
